resources.string: Could not refresh models. Check internet and try again.
Network issue while loading models. Check Wi‑Fi/cellular and try again.
Venice API service is down or overloaded. Try again in a moment.
Model data format changed. Please update the app.
No text models available right now.
Using non-encrypted settings storage because secure storage is unavailable on this device.
Microphone permission is off. Open Voice KB app permissions and allow microphone.
Enable this keyboard under Settings → Languages and input → On-screen keyboard, then switch to Voice KB when dictating.
Speech recognition uses the system speech service. If cleanup is on, your transcript and glossary terms are sent to Venice AI.
